speaker: speaker2
text: But I'm not sleepy , Mum . Can I stay and watch more TV ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It's already half past eleven . You have school tomorrow . You'll sleepy all tomorrow , if you don't sleep well tonight .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know . But I promise I won't be sleepy tomorrow . I work really hard .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don't you have the exams coming up soon ? I'm sure you could spend more time preparing for those .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , I nearly forgot the exams .

speaker: speaker1
text: You do well in maths , but your history is not good enough . Am I right ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , I guess so . Maybe I can go to sleep now and get up early to review the lessons tomorrow .

speaker: speaker1
text: An excellent idea . Work now and play later .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know you're right . School is more important than TV . Can I watch one more show , then go to bed .
